privileged_info_summary: The task involves editing mailbox properties in FreeScout, a self-hosted helpdesk and shared mailbox system. During setup, a mailbox is created programmatically with the name 'Equipment Intake' and email address 'intake@helpdesk.local'. The agent must edit this existing mailbox to change its name to 'Field Service Requests', update the email address to 'fieldservice@helpdesk.local', and add the alias 'equipmentintake@helpdesk.local' to preserve backward compatibility for incoming emails. All data is synthetic and generated by the test infrastructure.
